jit.enabled.provenance: Research uloha nepotrebuje JIT — vsechny faze jsou preddefinovane

replanning.enabled.provenance: Research uloha nema implementacni faze kde by doslo k divergenci

routing.enabled.provenance: Phase subset routing — faze 0-4 aktivni, 5-9 preskoceny

skip_phases.provenance: Research uloha: TDD (5), Plan (6), Execute (7), Verify (8), Completion (9) jsou irelevantni

approval_gates.provenance: Gate pred brainstormem (faze 3) a pred specifikaci (faze 4) — uzivatel schvaluje smer analyzy

active_phases.provenance: Meta (0) -> Research questions (1) -> Research answers (2) -> Brainstorm (3) -> Spec (4)

estimated_complexity.provenance: Stredni slozitost: 8 dokumentu k analyze, krizove referencovani, ale zadne zmeny kodu
